en: My son, do not forget my teaching, but let your heart keep my commandments,
zh: 我兒，不可忘記我的訓誨， 你的心要謹守我的誡命；

en: for length of days and years of life and peace they will add to you.
zh: 因為它們必把長久的日子、生命的歲數和平安，加給你。

en: Let not steadfast love and faithfulness forsake you; bind them around your neck; write them on the tablet of your heart.
zh: 不可讓慈愛誠實離開你， 要繫在你的頸項上， 刻在你的心版上。

en: So you will find favor and good success in the sight of God and man.
zh: 這樣，你在 神和世人眼前， 必蒙恩寵，得著美名 。

en: Trust in the LORD with all your heart, and do not lean on your own understanding.
zh: 你要一心仰賴耶和華， 不可倚靠自己的聰明；

en: In all your ways acknowledge him, and he will make straight your paths.
zh: 在你一切所行的路上，都要承認他， 他必使你的路徑平坦正直。

en: Be not wise in your own eyes; fear the LORD, and turn away from evil.
zh: 不可自以為有智慧， 要敬畏耶和華，遠離惡事。

en: It will be healing to your flesh and refreshment to your bones.
zh: 這必使你的身體健康， 使你的骨頭滋潤。

en: Honor the LORD with your wealth and with the firstfruits of all your produce;
zh: 你要把你的財物， 和一切初熟的農作物，敬奉耶和華。

en: then your barns will be filled with plenty, and your vats will be bursting with wine.
zh: 這樣，你的倉庫必充滿有餘， 你的榨酒池也必盈溢新酒。

en: My son, do not despise the LORD's discipline or be weary of his reproof,
zh: 我兒，不可輕看耶和華的管教， 也不可厭惡他的責備；

en: for the LORD reproves him whom he loves, as a father the son in whom he delights.
zh: 因為耶和華所愛的，他必責備， 正如父親責備他喜愛的兒子一樣。

en: Blessed is the one who finds wisdom, and the one who gets understanding,
zh: 得著智慧， 獲致聰明的人，是有福的。

en: for the gain from her is better than gain from silver and her profit better than gold.
zh: 因為智慧的利潤勝過銀子的利潤， 智慧的收益勝過黃金的收益。

en: She is more precious than jewels, and nothing you desire can compare with her.
zh: 智慧比紅寶石更寶貴； 你一切所喜愛的，都不足與智慧比較。

en: Long life is in her right hand; in her left hand are riches and honor.
zh: 智慧的右手有長壽， 左手有財富和尊榮。

en: Her ways are ways of pleasantness, and all her paths are peace.
zh: 智慧的道路盡是歡悅， 智慧的路徑全是平安。

en: She is a tree of life to those who lay hold of her; those who hold her fast are called blessed.
zh: 對緊握智慧的人來說，智慧是生命樹， 凡是緊抓智慧的，都是有福的。

en: The LORD by wisdom founded the earth; by understanding he established the heavens;
zh: 耶和華以智慧奠定大地， 以聰明堅立高天。

en: by his knowledge the deeps broke open, and the clouds drop down the dew.
zh: 因他的知識，深淵就裂開， 天空也滴下甘露。

en: My son, do not lose sight of these- keep sound wisdom and discretion,
zh: 我兒，要謹守大智慧和明辨的態度， 不可讓它們離開你的眼目。

en: and they will be life for your soul and adornment for your neck.
zh: 這樣，它們就必作你的生命， 作你頸上的華飾。

en: Then you will walk on your way securely, and your foot will not stumble.
zh: 你就可以安然走路， 你的腳必不致絆倒。

en: If you lie down, you will not be afraid; when you lie down, your sleep will be sweet.
zh: 你躺下的時候，必不會驚恐； 你躺臥的時候，必睡得香甜。

en: Do not be afraid of sudden terror or of the ruin of the wicked, when it comes,
zh: 忽然而來的驚恐，你不要懼怕； 惡人的毀滅臨到，你也不要恐懼；

en: for the LORD will be your confidence and will keep your foot from being caught.
zh: 因為耶和華是你的倚靠， 他必護衛你的腳不陷入網羅。

en: Do not withhold good from those to whom it is due, when it is in your power to do it.
zh: 如果你的手有行善的力量，就不可推辭， 要向那些需要幫助的人行善。

en: Do not say to your neighbor, "Go, and come again, tomorrow I will give it"- when you have it with you.
zh: 你那裡如果有現成的， 就不可對鄰舍說： “你先回去，明天再來吧，到時，我必給你！”

en: Do not plan evil against your neighbor, who dwells trustingly beside you.
zh: 你的鄰舍在你旁邊安居， 你不可設計害他。

en: Do not contend with a man for no reason, when he has done you no harm.
zh: 如果人沒有加害於你， 你不可無故與他相爭。

en: Do not envy a man of violence and do not choose any of his ways,
zh: 不要嫉妒強暴的人， 也不可選擇他所行的一切道路；

en: for the devious person is an abomination to the LORD, but the upright are in his confidence.
zh: 因為偏離正道的人，是耶和華所厭惡的， 正直人卻是他所親愛的。

en: The LORD's curse is on the house of the wicked, but he blesses the dwelling of the righteous.
zh: 耶和華咒詛惡人的家， 卻賜福給義人的居所。

en: Toward the scorners he is scornful, but to the humble he gives favor.
zh: 他譏笑那些好譏笑的人， 卻賜恩給謙卑的人。

en: The wise will inherit honor, but fools get disgrace.
zh: 智慧人必承受尊榮， 愚昧人必蒙受羞辱 。
